devdoc.details: Implementation of the ERC20 standard for campus canteen services.

allowance(address,address).details: Returns the amount which _spender is still allowed to withdraw from _owner.

approve(address,uint256).details: Allows _spender to withdraw from your account, up to the _value amount. Overwrites current allowance.

balanceOf(address).details: Returns the account balance of another account with address _owner.

constructor.details: Constructor sets the total supply and assigns it to the deployer. Total Supply: 100,000 * 10^18 (to account for decimals)

transfer(address,uint256).details: Transfers _value amount of tokens to address _to.

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: Transfers _value amount of tokens from address _from to address _to. Used by the canteen (spender) to deduct tokens from a student (owner).

@title Food Court SRMAP Token
 @dev Implementation of the ERC20 standard for campus canteen services.

@dev Constructor sets the total supply and assigns it to the deployer.
 Total Supply: 100,000 * 10^18 (to account for decimals)
@dev Returns the account balance of another account with address _owner.
@dev Transfers _value amount of tokens to address _to.

@dev Allows _spender to withdraw from your account, up to the _value amount.
 Overwrites current allowance.
@dev Returns the amount which _spender is still allowed to withdraw from _owner.

@dev Transfers _value amount of tokens from address _from to address _to.
 Used by the canteen (spender) to deduct tokens from a student (owner).
